case_title: REVIVER FINANCIAL, LLC, VS. EMMA MEDAL ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REVIVER FINANCIAL, LLC, ASSIGNEE OF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC, SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO NC FINANCIAL SOLUTIONS OF CALIFORNIA, LLC, D/B/A NETCREDIT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDAL, EMMA $4,554.06 PRINCIPAL, $381.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,935.86, SEE SCANNED DOC
